page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn6e-c12g1.12xlarge is a GPU-accelerated server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 48 dedicated physical cores on an x86_64 architecture, utilizing Intel Xeon 8163 processors running at 2.5 GHz. The system is equipped with 368.0 GB of system memory, providing 7.67 GB per core. Acceleration is delivered via four NVIDIA Volta V100 GPUs, providing a combined 128 GB of VRAM. Local storage is not bundled with this instance, and it features a baseline network bandwidth of 16 Gbps.

Performance benchmarks indicate a clear distinction between single-core and multi-core capabilities. Single-core CPU performance is weak, as shown by a stress-ng single-core score of 1110.4 and a poor gzip compression rate of 19.36 GB/sec. However, multi-core performance scales to average levels, with a stress-ng multi-core score of 35520.27 and multi-threaded bzip3 decompression reaching 147.7 GB/sec. Memory bandwidth is average, measuring 98.85 GB/sec for large block reads and 47.39 GB/sec for large block writes. Redis SET operations perform at 33.18 million operations per second, and static web serving throughput is sustained at 23.02 GB/sec.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, this instance represents a high-density resource profile where the primary value lies in the four bundled NVIDIA V100 GPUs and substantial memory capacity rather than raw single-core CPU speed. The lack of local storage requires external storage attachments, which should be factored into deployment architectures. This hardware configuration is best suited for GPU-accelerated workloads such as deep learning training, parallel scientific computing, and high-throughput data processing tasks that can leverage multi-threaded execution and GPU parallelization.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn6e-c12g1.12xlarge is a GPU-accelerated server instance designed for parallel computing workloads. Built on the x86_64 architecture with the KVM hypervisor, it features 48 dedicated physical cores powered by Intel Xeon 8163 processors running at 2.5 GHz. The instance is equipped with 368.0 GB of system memory and four NVIDIA Volta V100 GPUs, delivering a total of 128 GB of VRAM. It lacks local storage and provides a baseline network bandwidth of 16 Gbps. Benchmark data reveals weak single-core performance but average multi-core and memory bandwidth capabilities, with multi-threaded bzip3 decompression reaching 147.7 GB/sec. This resource profile is qualitatively cost-effective for GPU-intensive applications, deep learning, and parallel data processing, rather than single-threaded CPU tasks.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn6e-c12g1.12xlarge is a GPU-accelerated instance with 48 Intel Xeon cores, 368 GB RAM, and four NVIDIA Volta V100 GPUs providing 128 GB VRAM for parallel computing.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn6e-c12g1.12xlarge features 48 Intel Xeon cores, 368 GB RAM, and 4 NVIDIA V100 GPUs for parallel and GPU-accelerated workloads.
tagline: A GPU-accelerated platform featuring four dedicated accelerators and substantial system memory for highly parallelized computing and deep learning workloads.
bullet_points: Four NVIDIA Volta V100 GPUs with 128 GB total VRAM for parallel acceleration
48 dedicated Intel Xeon physical cores on x86_64 architecture
368.0 GB of system memory providing 7.67 GB per core
16 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with no bundled local storage
Best suited for deep learning, parallel scientific computing, and multi-threaded data processing
